subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee and upon the Afnán, and upon those who are with thee, who love thee and who recognize thy stations before God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک و علی افنانی و علی من معکم و یحبکم و یعلم مقاماتکم عند الله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @high station of the true believer, @naming of children; of individuals
